examples: The darkest hour might usher in the sunburst.
Destruction of bone with sunburst appearance.
The company behind the scheme is Sunburst Biotechnologies.
Two days after the fire Sunburst was running at a third of its normal capacity.
By early July the water temperature in Sunburst's trout raceways was 73 degrees, deadly to trout.
